name: Buttermilk Beet Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Peeled Beets, Cut Into Julienne
Freshly Ground Black Pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cousin Walter and those who dined with him looked forward to this well-chilled light beet soup on warm days. Milk, plain yogurt, or a combination of the two can be used instead of buttermilk.
2. Melt the butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
3. Add the onions and celery, and sauté for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the celery is soft and golden.
4. Stir in the celery leaves and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
5. Add the remaining ingredients except the buttermilk and dill to the saucepan.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and let it simmer for 20 minutes or until the beets are tender.
7. Remove from heat and stir in the buttermilk and dill.
8. Allow the soup to cool completely before refrigerating until thoroughly chilled.
